query:
-- Find RVC ICT Consulting customer
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, contactEmail, status
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%RVC%' OR name LIKE '%Ian Donald%' OR businessName LIKE '%RVC%'
ORDER BY name LIMIT 10;

-- Find the two NBN services by external ID or AVC
SELECT id, externalId, serviceType, provider, planName, avcId, locId, locationAddress, customerExternalId, customerName, monthlyCost, status
FROM services 
WHERE externalId IN ('13207099', '13300275') 
   OR avcId = 'AVC400045874456'
   OR connectionId IN ('13207099', '13300275')
LIMIT 10;
